creator: igoro@FreeBSD.org
text:
Anyway, considering its eventual removal from ports, other ports like the listed ones will have to remove the condition and dependency line as well. But we could keep it as is for as long as possible until the removal, i.e. until 30-Apr-2026+.

It means that the listed ports will lose the capability of self-testing for non-FreeBSD platforms and for FreeBSD instances WITHOUT_TESTS. Probably, having such downgrade for 4 or 5 ports is the least trade-off comparing to headache keeping everything in "sync": /usr/tests from different FreeBSD versions, kyua from base of different FreeBSD versions, and kyua from Q/main ports potentially used with any FreeBSD version.
